scripts.promptfoo:smoke: PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_UPDATE=1 pnpm exec promptfoo eval -c evals/promptfoo/echo.yaml --no-cache

pnpm.comment: Security overrides: pin transitive dev deps (under promptfoo/jsdom) to the patched floor WITHIN the same major, to clear Dependabot CVEs without an unnecessary major bump. See docs/security/security-debt-register.md.
